title: calonema floribundum
intro: Calonema floribundum, also known as the Indian clematis or sweet clematis, is a flowering vine that belongs to the balsam family (Imporiaceae). This plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve respiratory issues. The health benefits of Calonema floribundum include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to reduce fever, alleviate digestive problems, and protect against oxidative stress. Herbal preparations of Calonema floribundum include decoctions, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including coughs, colds, and digestive disorders.
